title: Windows New User Account Created
description: Detects creation of a new Windows user account (EventID 4720), a common persistence technique.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-013: Windows New User Account Created

aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=4720%' AND UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
